summary: Receipt & Payment Ledger module tested thoroughly. All 24 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. Features working: ledger heads CRUD, entry creation with auto-voucher (RCP/PMT-YYYYMMDD-XXXX), running balance calculation, filters, reports, edit/delete (admin only), settings.

issues: Minor ESLint warning: useCallback has a missing dependency 'pagination' (line 121) - not critical but should be addressed

critical_code_review_comments: Good: All data-testid attributes present on interactive elements
Good: Proper validation for future dates and positive amounts
Good: RBAC enforced - delete only for admin/superadmin roles
Good: Voucher number format follows specification (RCP/PMT-YYYYMMDD-XXXX)
Good: Running balance calculation is accurate
Minor: React hook dependency warning in LedgerPage.js - should include 'pagination' in useCallback dependencies
seed_data_creation: Test entries created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Receipt & Payment Ledger module fully functional. Test data created: TEST_* entries, UI Test - entries. All CRUD operations working. Reports (monthly, cash book, bank book, day-wise) all functional.

features_tested.running_balance_auto_calculation: PASSED - receipts increase, payments decrease balance
features_tested.summary_cards_totals: PASSED - Opening, Receipts, Payments, Closing all correct
